milestone: Momo-only readiness before requesting owner or provider access
overallRule: Momo remains fail-closed No-Go. Implemented preconnection controls and development-proxy evidence are not operating-readiness proof. Readiness stays blocked until the required authenticated rehearsal and real-authority evidence pass; no result in this record authorizes owner contact, provider access, a model call, a public action, publishing, or activation.

identityBoundary.rule: The iCloud Client account is temporary development evidence only. Its Momo data may support internal rehearsal, but it can never approve owner actions, provider access, public content, or activation.

spendingBoundary.rule: Faraz authorized a one-time ceiling of up to $20 for this Momo setup and media rehearsal. Authorization is not an incurred charge and does not authorize recurring spend, provider activation, account connection, publishing, or activation.

development_identity_and_data.label: Development identity and Momo data boundary
evidence: The Team account and temporary iCloud Client account can be used for controlled development sign-in.
The repository classifies the iCloud account as development_proxy rather than real_owner.
Development-proxy evidence is separated from owner-authorized evidence.
blockers: No verified Momo owner authority exists.
Development data cannot authorize an external or public action.
development_identity_and_data.nextAction: Keep the iCloud account development-only and use it solely for the authenticated internal rehearsal.

database_security_and_controls.label: Database security and preconnection controls
evidence: The repository defines Momo-scoped access controls, exact action-consent boundaries, cache expiry, evidence classification, runtime locks, and server-derived gates.
Rollback-oriented checks exercise caller roles and fail-closed contracts without retaining rehearsal data.

The reviewed Momo preconnection migration is applied in Veroxa Dev: all expected tables have RLS, runtime controls remain locked, provider connections remain absent, and the evidence manifest is valid.
blockers: The authenticated Team one-click rehearsal has not passed against Supabase.
database_security_and_controls.nextAction: Run the authenticated Team rehearsal and inspect its persisted gate result.

media_editing_and_lineage.label: Media editing, rights, and lineage
evidence: The repository includes safe image presets, deterministic edit recipes, browser rendering, output hashing, alt text, storage paths, and rendition lineage.
Media placement and rehearsal contracts require scoped renditions and keep external writes disabled.
blockers: Authenticated Team upload, render, register, read, placement, and cleanup have not passed the one-click Supabase rehearsal.
No real-owner media rights are available for public use.
media_editing_and_lineage.nextAction: Run the authenticated Team rehearsal with synthetic media and verify the complete private rendition lifecycle.

ai_and_automation.label: AI contract and safe automation
evidence: The repository includes a provider-neutral structured-output contract, grounding fields, human-review requirements, idempotency, bounded retries, recovery, and audit records.
Offline rehearsal keeps model calls and external writes disabled.
blockers: The complete automation lifecycle has not passed the authenticated Team one-click rehearsal.
ai_and_automation.nextAction: Exercise the offline AI and automation contracts through the authenticated Team rehearsal without calling a model.

publication_tracking_and_metrics.label: Publication rehearsal, tracking, and metrics
evidence: The repository includes no-write publication scenarios for Facebook, Instagram, and Google Business.
Tracking contracts normalize campaign parameters, reject identifying data, and keep source metrics separate.
blockers: The complete channel and failure matrix has not passed the authenticated Team one-click rehearsal.
No provider is connected and no public publishing is authorized.
publication_tracking_and_metrics.nextAction: Run the private multi-channel publication, tracking, and metrics rehearsal and confirm that every receipt remains simulated.

seo_workspace.label: SEO evidence and reversible change planning
evidence: The repository includes public-page evidence capture, structured findings, reversible title and description drafts, structured-data validation, and rollback snapshots.
SEO preparation does not require a website write.
blockers: The SEO baseline and change-plan flow has not passed the authenticated Team one-click rehearsal.
seo_workspace.nextAction: Persist and validate the public-evidence SEO baseline and reversible draft during the authenticated Team rehearsal.

authenticated_team_rehearsal.label: Authenticated Team one-click rehearsal
evidence: A Team-only control is implemented to run the private media, AI, automation, publication, tracking, metrics, SEO, and preconnection-gate sequence.
blockers: The one-click sequence has not completed successfully against Supabase as an authenticated Team user.
No persisted preconnection pass is claimed.
authenticated_team_rehearsal.nextAction: Run the Team-only rehearsal once the reviewed migration is available, inspect every result, and keep all external actions disabled.

owner_authority_and_consent.label: Owner authority, consent, and handoff
evidence: Owner authority and exact-action consent are separate from development-proxy access.
blockers: The actual Momo owner has not been contacted or verified.
No owner consent or account handoff is authorized.
owner_authority_and_consent.nextAction: Do nothing until the internal preconnection gate is reviewed and Faraz separately authorizes owner contact.

provider_access_and_public_actions.label: Provider access and public actions
evidence: Meta, Google Business, website, model, and publishing adapters remain behind disabled runtime controls.
blockers: No provider credential or owner-controlled access is authorized.
No model call, provider read, provider write, website write, review reply, or public post is enabled.
provider_access_and_public_actions.nextAction: Keep every connection inactive until owner authority and each exact permission are obtained after preconnection review.

activation.label: Activation
evidence: Activation is a separate final decision and cannot be inferred from repository completion or a rehearsal.
blockers: Owner, provider, public-action, and activation gates are false.
activation.nextAction: Do not activate Momo until all later authorization and operating gates pass.
